channel.title: GitHub Swift Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Swift in GitHub

item.title: stripe/stripe-ios
item.description: Stripe iOS SDK

item.title: swiftlang/swift-package-manager
item.description: The Package Manager for the Swift Programming Language

item.title: tuist/tuist
item.description: Tuist's CLI

item.title: apple/swift-collections
item.description: Commonly used data structures for Swift

item.title: apple/swift-async-algorithms
item.description: Async Algorithms for Swift

item.title: pointfreeco/swift-composable-architecture
item.description: A library for building applications in a consistent and understandable way, with composition, testing, and ergonomics in mind.

item.title: realm/SwiftLint
item.description: A tool to enforce Swift style and conventions.

item.title: Stengo/DeskPad
item.description: A virtual monitor for screen sharing

item.title: ChartsOrg/Charts
item.description: Beautiful charts for iOS/tvOS/OSX! The Apple side of the crossplatform MPAndroidChart.

item.title: daltoniam/Starscream
item.description: Websockets in swift for iOS and OSX

item.title: kean/Nuke
item.description: Image loading system

item.title: TheWidlarzGroup/react-native-video
item.description: A

item.title: SwiftGen/SwiftGen
item.description: The Swift code generator for your assets, storyboards, Localizable.strings, … — Get rid of all String-based APIs!

item.title: groue/GRDB.swift
item.description: A toolkit for SQLite databases, with a focus on application development

item.title: jellyfin/Swiftfin
item.description: Native Jellyfin Client for iOS and tvOS

item.title: mrousavy/react-native-vision-camera
item.description: 📸 A powerful, high-performance React Native Camera library.

item.title: airbnb/lottie-ios
item.description: An iOS library to natively render After Effects vector animations

item.title: ReactiveX/RxSwift
item.description: Reactive Programming in Swift

item.title: facebook/facebook-ios-sdk
item.description: Used to integrate the Facebook Platform with your iOS & tvOS apps.

item.title: stephencelis/SQLite.swift
item.description: A type-safe, Swift-language layer over SQLite3.

item.title: onevcat/Kingfisher
item.description: A lightweight, pure-Swift library for downloading and caching images from the web.

item.title: vapor/vapor
item.description: 💧 A server-side Swift HTTP web framework.
